overall_verdict: la consistency target ne change pas la hierarchie; nominal reste meilleur sur l'historique reel, sizing_3state domine le bootstrap et la survivabilite simulee

rulesets.name: topstepx_50k_main_35d
rulesets.notes: Trailing MLL stays 2,000 below the running high-watermark; no breakeven lock is added.

rulesets.name: topstepx_50k_extended_60d
rulesets.description: Longer horizon to separate risk geometry from speed / expiry pressure.
rulesets.notes: Same Topstep-style risk rules, but with a longer traded-day horizon.
